name: Ascenda WF-08: Post-Show Reporting & Buyer Follow-Up

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Write an executive post-show report for a Sam\'s Club Category 63 Roadshow event. Brand: ' + $json.brandName + '. Retailer: ' + $json.retailer + '. Total Revenue: $' + $json.totalRevenue + '. Units Sold: ' + $json.unitsSold + '. ROI: ' + $json.roi + '%. Daily Revenue: $' + $json.dailyRevenue + '. Consumer Captures: ' + $json.consumerCaptures + '. Include: Performance Summary, Key Wins (3 bullets), Areas for Improvement (2 bullets), Consumer Insights, Buyer Follow-Up Recommendations, Expansion Recommendations (repeat shows, additional clubs, Costco crossover), 2026 Roadmap Alignment. Professional executive style.' }] }) }}

parameters.subject: =Post-Show Report: {{ $json.brandName }} Roadshow Results (ROI: {{ $json.roi }}%)
parameters.message:
=

Roadshow Complete - Performance Report

Total Revenue${{ $json.totalRevenue }}
Units Sold{{ $json.unitsSold }}
ROI{{ $json.roi }}%
Daily Revenue${{ $json.dailyRevenue }}
Consumer Captures{{ $json.consumerCaptures }}
{{ $json.executiveReport }}

Our team will follow up with expansion recommendations and buyer recap.

meta.description: Stage 8 - Post-Show Reporting & Buyer Follow-Up. Aggregates event data, generates executive report, updates master, emails results. If ROI >= 20%, triggers growth analysis.
